publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-04-30 23:02:29 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, diaries, printed materials, research materials.
did.abstract: Subject files, diaries, and general correspondence pertaining to Austin's career. Also copy of his Ph.D. thesis, "Harmonic Rhythm in 20th-Century Music," from Harvard University, 1950; and files relating to his students including the composer Steve Reich.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: William Weaver Austin (1920- ) has been professor of music history and appreciation at Cornell since 1947. He was chairman of the Music Department from 1958 to 1963 and also served as University organist.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Subject files, diaries, and general correspondence pertaining to Austin's career. Also copy of his Ph.D. thesis, "Harmonic Rhythm in 20th-Century Music," from Harvard University, 1950; and files relating to his students including the composer Steve Reich.
Includes music written by Austin for his wife for poems by A. R. Ammons, W. H. Auden, e. e. cummings, Phyllis McGinley, W. B. Yeats, and others.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Correspondence Steve Reich Lionel Wolberger Boxes 1-5
Series III. Articles, Notes, Teaching Materials, and Miscellany Boxes 5 and 9

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: William W. Austin Papers, #14-20-2297. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to diaries in Boxes 6-8 restricted to the permission of donor.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to the Steve Reich papers in Box 8 restricted to permission of Mr. Reich.

did.unittitle: F. Advisory C. on the Presidency - Confidential Records of Meetings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Barker, D. 1967; Battersby 1975; Bell, Barbara 1976; Bent, M.; Bentzon, N.; Bishop, J.; Black, Max 1969; Blum, Steve 1982; Bonaventura, Mario 1970; Borroff, E. 1978; Borris, S. 1961; Boult 1962; Bower, Calvin 1982; Brook, Claire 1987

Notes and Drafts on Rhythm, W. Austin

"The Rise and Fall of Staff Notation"
